questions.question: Which Indian state hosted the 38ᵗʰ National Games in 2025?
In April 2025, which Indian cricketer was named for Wisden Leading Cricketers in the World 2024 who scored 1659 runs across formats in 2024?
Who among the following was honoured as the International Cricket Council (ICC) Men’s Cricketer of the Year for outstanding performance in 2024?
Which Indian athlete won gold in the women's high jump at the 2025 Asian Athletics Championships?
Who among the following became the first Indian chess player to qualify for the Esports World Cup (EWC) 2025 through the second leg of the Champions Chess Tour?
Which Indian state hosted the 38ᵗʰ edition of the National Games in early 2025?
Who became the first athlete to break a national record at the Khelo India Para Games 2025 by lifting 101 kg in the 45 kg category powerlifting in March 2025?
Which city hosted the opening ceremony of the 2025 National Games?
In 2025, which city in France hosted the French Open tennis tournament?
In which of the following shooting events (in distance) did Simranpreet Kaur Brar win silver medal in the women’s category at ISSF World Cup 2025, Lima?
In which state was the 7ᵗʰ Khelo India Youth Games held in 2025?
Which country served as the host for the 2025 Asian Winter Games?
Puja Tomar, the first Indian woman to achieve a victory in a UFC (Ultimate Fighting Championship) fight in 2024, participates in which sport?
Which team did the United States defeat to win the gold medal at the 2025 International Ice Hockey Federation (IIHF) World Championship?
Which of the following locations was among the venues that hosted the inaugural Khelo India Beach Games in 2025?
What is the focus of the Scheme of Human Resources Development in Sports?
questions.option_1: Training and development of sports professionals
questions.option_2: Construction of gyms in every part of India
questions.option_4: Building swimming pools for agile swimmers

questions.question: Which Indian relay team set a national record in the 4x100m event at the National Relay Carnival 2025?
questions.option_1: Amiya Mallick, Mohammed Anas, Noah Nirmal Tom, Rajesh Ramesh
questions.option_2: Srabani Nanda, Dutee Chand, Hima Das, Archana Suseendran
questions.option_3: Gurindervir Singh, Animesh Kujur, Manikanta H, Amlan Borgohain
questions.option_4: Gurindervir Singh, Animesh Kujur, Manikanta H, Amiya Mallick

questions.question: The government initiative known as KIRTI, an acronym for Khelo India Rising Talent Identification, was inaugurated in ______.

What was the name of stadium where India beat Bangladesh in South Asian Football Federation (SAFF) Under-19 Championship 2025?
What was the mascot name of Khelo India Youth Games 2025 held in Bihar in May 2025?
Which country won both the Men’s and Women’s titles at the Kabaddi World Cup 2025, held at Wolverhampton in England?
Harsabardhan Sahu who built a new record in the field of 49 kg (Clean and Jerk) Weightlifting category, at Khelo India Youth Games 2025 is from which state?
Who made history as the first woman, the youngest person, and the first African to be elected President of the International Olympic Committee (IOC) in 2025?
Who was the first Indian to win a gold medal at the Commonwealth Games?
Who among the following became India’s first Grandmaster in chess in 1988?
Who among the following won a maiden Italian Open title in May 2025 by defeating world No. 1 Jannik Sinner in Rome?
Which of the following events is known as India's biggest multi-sport national competition?
Who among the following was the first Indian athlete to win an Olympic gold medal?
In which year was the Rajiv Gandhi Khel Ratna Award officially renamed the Major Dhyan Chand Khel Ratna Award?
Who among the following was the first Indian athlete to win the Rajiv Gandhi Khel Ratna Award?
